name: aspens
description: Keep coding-agent context accurate as your codebase changes

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  📌 aspens v0.8.0: Skill triggers moved from `## Activation` to YAML frontmatter `triggers:` (back-compat preserved). Domain clusters restored to `code-map.md` (language-agnostic). AGENTS.md no longer drops unchanged skills on partial `doc sync`. Code-map.md is now churn-stable across syncs.
     Re-run `aspens doc sync` to regenerate skills with the new triggers format.

  🌲 aspens is in active development — please keep it up to date.
     Run into issues? Let us know: https://github.com/aspenkit/aspens/issues
'
